description: Canonical FCB capability IDs for department composition

capabilities.strategic-planning: Mission, goals, priorities, decision rights, escalation policy
capabilities.product-delivery: Create and ship the core product or service
capabilities.marketing: Positioning, copy, campaigns, SEO, social, ads, CRO
capabilities.sales-revenue: Leads, pipeline, proposals, closing, CRM, partnerships
capabilities.finance-accounting: Pricing, revenue, costs, budgets, invoices, unit economics
capabilities.legal-compliance: Contracts, privacy, terms, regulated claims, licenses
capabilities.tooling-it-security: Accounts, integrations, credentials, access, smoke tests
capabilities.research-intelligence: Market, competitor, and customer research synthesis
capabilities.knowledge-documentation: Wiki, SOPs, decision log, artifact index
